title: Add CI validation for DevContainer configuration
description: Run JSON syntax checks, policy guardrails, and a Docker build when .devcontainer files change so developer environment regressions are caught before merge.

title: Clean obsolete auto-improvement artifacts from repo root
description: Review tracked PLAN/TASKS/TEST_REPORT artifacts and move recurring reports to a dedicated generated-artifacts location if they are not intended source files.

title: Add automated policy review for generated configs
description: Teach the auto-improvement loop to flag telemetry defaults and outdated schema patterns during planning/review before PR creation.
